title: BBMB – ITI Apprentices – 45 Posts
shortInfo: BBMB Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 45 vacancies for ITI Apprentices posts. Candidates can apply online only from 08.05.2026 to 04.06.2026 through BBMB website bbmb.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: BBMB ITI Apprentices 2026-27: Apply Online for 45 Posts at Dehar Power House Circle, Slapper
basic_details.short_information: BBMB Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 45 vacancies for ITI Apprentices posts. Candidates can apply online only from 08.05.2026 to 04.06.2026 through BBMB website bbmb.gov.in.

how_to_apply: Visit the National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS) Portal: https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in
Register/Login and fill the online application for the desired trade under Dehar Power House Circle BBMB Slapper.
Ensure Aadhaar Card details are available, as they are mandatory for registration.
Submit the application on or before 04.06.2026. No other mode of application will be accepted.
seo_tags: Bhakra Byas Management Board ITI Apprentices Recruitment 2026
